Completed Terminal API implementation with all deliverables:

✅ Implemented methods:
- terminal_create: Creates tmux pane in Village session
- terminal_output: Captures output from tmux pane
- terminal_kill: Kills tmux pane
- terminal_release: Releases terminal (keeps pane alive)
- terminal_wait_for_exit: Waits for terminal command to exit

✅ Additional work:
- Added capture_pane() function to tmux.py
- Fixed session_cancel to handle different task states
- Added 7 new tests for parameter validation
- All 14 ACP bridge tests passing

Completed Notification Streaming implementation with all deliverables:

✅ Implemented infrastructure:
- stream_notifications(): Async generator for real-time event streaming
- Enhanced _event_to_notification() with comprehensive event type mapping
- Event subscription via async generator pattern

✅ Event type mappings:
- state_transition → state_change notifications
- file_modified/created/deleted → file_change notifications
- conflict_detected/merge_conflict → conflict notifications
- queue/resume/cleanup/claim/release → lifecycle notifications
- error result → error notifications

✅ Testing:
- Added 6 new tests for notification conversion
- All 20 ACP bridge tests passing
- Stream generator type verification

Completed CLI refactor and ACP commands implementation:

✅ CLI Refactor:
- Split monolithic cli.py (1384 lines) into modular structure
- Created village/cli/ package with logical groupings:
  - lifecycle: new, up, down
  - state: status, locks, events, state
  - acp: NEW server/client commands
  - (tasks, monitoring, maintenance, chat pending migration)
- Backward compatible - all old commands still work
- Clear migration path for future refactoring

✅ ACP CLI Commands:
- village acp server start [--host] [--port] [--daemon]
- village acp server stop
- village acp server status [--json]
- village acp client list [--json]
- village acp client spawn <agent-name> [--test]

✅ Features:
- Server start launches Village as ACP agent
- Server status shows configuration and state
- Client list shows configured ACP agents
- Client spawn tests agent connections
- All commands support --json flag
- Integration with ACP config from bd-4uv.9

All commands tested and working.

Completed CLI Commands implementation with all deliverables:

✅ Implemented commands:
- village acp --server start [--host HOST] [--port PORT]
- village acp --server stop
- village acp --server status
- village acp --client list
- village acp --client spawn <agent-name>
- village acp --client test <agent-name>

✅ Features:
- Flag-based structure (--server/--client) instead of nested groups
- All commands support --json flag for structured output
- Server start: Launches Village as ACP agent (async)
- Server stop: Placeholder for future daemon mode
- Server status: Shows ACP configuration and capabilities
- Client list: Lists configured ACP agents from .village/config
- Client spawn: Spawns external ACP agent process
- Client test: Tests connection to external agent

✅ Testing:
- All commands manually tested
- Configuration parsing verified
- JSON output verified
